name: easyfolio
description: EasyFolio - AI Resume Analyzer & Portfolio Builder

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd easyfolio-ai && npm install && cd ../easyfolio-portfolio && npm install
scripts.build:all: npm run build:ai && npm run build:portfolio

author: EasyFolio
note: 后端使用 Vercel Serverless Function (api/chat.js)，开发环境使用 npm run dev:server
